name: ai-agent-manager-plugin
description: AI agents v12.1.0 — Documentation + skills increment over v12.0.0: new Memory Tool skill (Anthropic memory-tool reference for long-running agents), new Structured Outputs guidance in AGENT_GUIDELINES.md spanning the API direct (output_config.format) and plugin (SubagentStop hook) enforcement paths, and an Advisor Tool SDK-only documentation note (advisor-tool-2026-03-01 beta header / advisor_20260301 type — not currently propagatable through Task-spawned plugin subagents; reachable only via direct client.beta.messages.create calls). Compaction-recovery hooks were spiked and deferred (NO-GO; PostCompact has no documented additionalContext path). Preserves all v12.0.0 reliability primitives: inter-subtask provides/requires contracts, pre-spawn dependency verification gate, scope-expansion adjudication (4-option escalation), effort-tier discipline across the 10 execution-shaped agents, hardened SubagentStop validation rejecting outputs_gap/toolset_gap drift, WORKER_RESULT schema_version 2 with outputs_verified[] + outputs_gap. Builds on v11.2.0 (opt-in GitHub Issues telemetry), v11.1.x (inline-execution guard, Phase 4.5 completion-tail invariant), v11.0 (self-heal), v10.3 layers. 12 agent roles, 49 reusable skills, 13 quality gate hooks, persistent agent memory, bundled MySQL MCP server.
